case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. TAI LY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100076196) AS TO DEFENDANT LY, TAI

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LY, TAI $2,085.13 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
